channel.title: GitHub Unknown languages Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Unknown languages in GitHub

item.title: jwasham/coding-interview-university
item.description: A complete computer science study plan to become a software engineer.

item.title: x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools
item.description: FULL Augment Code, Claude Code, Cluely, CodeBuddy, Cursor, Devin AI, Junie, Kiro, Leap.new, Lovable, Manus Agent Tools, NotionAI, Orchids.app, Perplexity, Poke, Qoder, Replit, Same.dev, Trae, Traycer AI, VSCode Agent, Warp.dev, Windsurf, Xcode, Z.ai Code, dia & v0. (And other Open Sourced) System Prompts, Internal Tools & AI Models

item.title: ByteByteGoHq/system-design-101
item.description: Explain complex systems using visuals and simple terms. Help you prepare for system design interviews.

item.title: joonspk-research/generative_agents
item.description: Generative Agents: Interactive Simulacra of Human Behavior

item.title: KenneyNL/Adobe-Alternatives
item.description: A list of alternatives for Adobe software

item.title: fffaraz/awesome-cpp
item.description: A curated list of awesome C++ (or C) frameworks, libraries, resources, and shiny things. Inspired by awesome-... stuff.
